findings.plugin_load_status: Plugin was failing to load since installation: 'No module named plugin'. Root cause: (1) __init__.py used absolute import 'from plugin.terminal_jail.plugin' which can't resolve since Hermes registers plugins under 'hermes_plugins' namespace. (2) No register(ctx) function. (3) Hook names 'terminal.command.transform' don't exist in Hermes. FIXED: relative import, register(ctx) with pre_tool_call + transform_terminal_output hooks.
findings.pre_execution_hook_gap: Hermes core has no pre-execution command-transform hook. pre_tool_call only supports block/allow, not command modification. transform_terminal_output fires post-execution. Until this gap is closed, plugin provides observability only.
findings.tests: 75 passed, 26 skipped (integration skips due to unshare --mount-proc limitations)
findings.ci_health: 4/5 recent runs green. 1 transient failure (Go runtime pthread_create failed on GH runner)
findings.host_health: System showing fork: retry errors — transient PID pressure

current_blocker: HOOK-GAP-01: Hermes core needs pre-execution command-transform hook
